children.value: Triple recopilatorio que incluye temas de los artistas más influyentes de los últimos 25 años. Un repaso a la mejor música pop de los 80, los 90 y actualidad. La banda sonora de la generación MTV.
Don´t stand so close to me - The Police
Video killed the radio star - The Buggles
God gave rock & Roll to you - Kiss
If I could turn back time - Cher
I want to know what love is - Foreigner
Holding back the years - Simply Red
Me myself and I - De la Soul
Fight for your right - The Beastie Boys
Everyday is a winding road - Sheryl Crow
Happy when it rains - Garbage Only
Baby one more time - Britney Spears
Still D.R.E. - Dr Dre feat. Snoop Dogg
I don't feel like dancin - Scissor Sisters
When you were young - The Killers
It' s my life - Bon Jovi
What you waiting for - Gwen Stefani
You give me something - James Morrison
We are all made of stars - Moby
